skills.name: pdf-analysis
skills.title: PDF 阅读分析
skills.description: 用于本地 PDF 的整篇阅读、章节定位和页级问答，适合回答“这份文档讲什么”“这一部分讲什么”“第几页写了什么”等深读问题。
examples: 这份白皮书主要讲什么
第五页讲得什么
第二部分强调了什么
把这份 PDF 的核心结论压成三条行动建议

runtime.name: pdf-analysis
runtime.title: PDF 阅读分析
runtime.description: 用于本地 PDF 的整篇阅读、章节定位和页级问答，适合回答“这份文档讲什么”“这一部分讲什么”“第几页写了什么”等深读问题。
examples: 这份白皮书主要讲什么
第五页讲得什么
第二部分强调了什么
把这份 PDF 的核心结论压成三条行动建议

prompt.name: pdf-analysis
prompt.title: PDF 阅读分析
prompt.capability: 用于本地 PDF 的整篇阅读、章节定位和页级问答，适合回答“这份文档讲什么”“这一部分讲什么”“第几页写了什么”等深读问题。
prompt.use_when: Use for reading local documents or PDFs, including whole-document, section-level, and page-level questions.
prompt.delegation_protocol: When the main agent delegates, ask for pdf_reading; pass file path, page range or section, reading mode, and the exact question. If the user only needs knowledge-base evidence, return that the task belongs to rag-skill.
prompt.return_protocol: Return a concise Chinese result with page or section anchors, a short summary, and any OCR or extraction limits. If the document is not enough, state exactly what is missing.
prompt.output_rule: Directly answer the user-facing task. Do not describe internal tool calls, routing policy, or protocol.

skills.name: rag-skill
skills.title: 知识库问答
skills.description: 面向本地知识库、FAQ 和内部资料的检索问答工作流，适合做基于现有材料的事实确认、规则解释和可追溯回答。
examples: 从本地知识库里查一下三一重工前三大股东
根据内部资料解释一下这个产品的退款规则
为什么我在我的帐户中找不到我的订单
帮我从知识库里确认这个功能是否支持批量导出

runtime.name: rag-skill
runtime.title: 知识库问答

examples: 从本地知识库里查一下三一重工前三大股东

帮我从知识库里确认这个功能是否支持批量导出

prompt.name: rag-skill
prompt.title: 知识库问答
prompt.capability: 面向本地知识库、FAQ 和内部资料的检索问答工作流，适合做基于现有材料的事实确认、规则解释和可追溯回答。
prompt.use_when: Use for local knowledge-base lookup, factual explanation, and questions that should be answered from local materials.
prompt.delegation_protocol: When the main agent delegates, ask for evidence_lookup; pass the user question, the exact answer scope, known document anchors, and any active knowledge-base hints. If the question is about a PDF, dataset, or page/section, do not expand scope; return that this skill is not the right specialist.
prompt.return_protocol: Return a concise Chinese result with three parts: conclusion, evidence, and limitations. Include the source name or retrieval anchor, the key fact fragments, and whether the evidence is sufficient. Do not mention internal tool names.
prompt.output_rule: Directly answer the user-facing task. Do not describe internal tool calls, routing policy, or protocol.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.title: Skill 创建顾问
skills.description: 用于创建、改写和审查能力系统 Skill，帮助把用户意图整理成清晰的能力边界、触发条件、执行准则和模型可见提示。
examples: 帮我创建一个用于写小说章节审核的 skill
把这个技能的使用条件写清楚
检查这个 SKILL.md 是否适合给 agent 使用
为能力系统新增一个文档审核 skill

runtime.name: skill-creator
runtime.title: Skill 创建顾问
runtime.description: 用于创建、改写和审查能力系统 Skill，帮助把用户意图整理成清晰的能力边界、触发条件、执行准则和模型可见提示。
examples: 帮我创建一个用于写小说章节审核的 skill

为能力系统新增一个文档审核 skill

prompt.name: skill-creator
prompt.title: Skill 创建顾问
prompt.capability: 用于创建、改写和审查能力系统 Skill，帮助把用户意图整理成清晰的能力边界、触发条件、执行准则和模型可见提示。
prompt.delegation_protocol: When the main agent delegates, ask for capability_design or skill_update; pass the target use case, expected trigger phrases, execution boundary, required tools, and whether the skill must coordinate with sub-agents. If the request is only a wording polish, keep scope narrow and avoid inventing new behavior.
prompt.return_protocol: Return a concrete skill draft or review notes with three parts: boundary, prompt structure, and validation gaps. Clearly separate what should be changed in metadata, what should be changed in the body, and what should remain untouched. If the skill is too broad, say how to split it.
prompt.output_rule: Directly answer the user-facing task. Do not describe internal tool calls, routing policy, or protocol.

skills.name: structured-data-analysis
skills.title: 结构化数据分析
skills.description: 用于本地 Excel、CSV、JSON 等结构化数据的可计算分析，适合筛选、排序、分组汇总、Top N、极值记录和结构检查。
examples: 销售前五的有哪些
薪水最高的员工是谁
按地区汇总订单总额
从我的数据库中查询哪些商品库存不足
按仓库汇总前五

runtime.name: structured-data-analysis
runtime.title: 结构化数据分析
runtime.description: 用于本地 Excel、CSV、JSON 等结构化数据的可计算分析，适合筛选、排序、分组汇总、Top N、极值记录和结构检查。
examples: 销售前五的有哪些
薪水最高的员工是谁
按地区汇总订单总额
从我的数据库中查询哪些商品库存不足
按仓库汇总前五

prompt.name: structured-data-analysis
prompt.title: 结构化数据分析
prompt.capability: 用于本地 Excel、CSV、JSON 等结构化数据的可计算分析，适合筛选、排序、分组汇总、Top N、极值记录和结构检查。
prompt.use_when: Use for structured data questions such as filtering, ranking, grouping, summary statistics, and record lookup.
prompt.delegation_protocol: When the main agent delegates, ask for table_analysis; pass dataset path, required columns, filter or grouping rules, ranking criteria, and the required output shape.
prompt.return_protocol: Return the computed answer, the calculation basis, and the relevant rows or aggregates. If the data is incomplete, state which column or sheet is missing.
prompt.output_rule: Directly answer the user-facing task. Do not describe internal tool calls, routing policy, or protocol.
